species: Leptin-deficient ob/ob (obese) mice and leptin receptor (LepR)-deficient db/db (diabetes) mice are commonly used models...
tissue: ANGPTL4 was elicited from brown adipose tissue after tenotomy...
cell_type: ANGPTL4 (angiopoietin-like protein 4) bound to LepR on mesenchymal cells at the HO site...
disease_state: Leptin-deficient ob/ob (obese) mice and leptin receptor (LepR)-deficient db/db (diabetes) mice are commonly used models mimicking conditions of obesity and type 2 diabetes.
sample_source: Thus, we collected serum from the HO group (4 wk after tenotomy) and sham controls.
age: db/db, ob/ob, and C57BL/6 mice (4-wk- or 8-wk-old) were purchased from GemPharmatech...
anatomic_site_tumor: incisions were made on the Achilles’s tendon of db/db and ob/ob mice...
cell_line: exogenous ANGPTL4 (10 ng/mL) protein enhanced toluidine blue staining of human umbilical cord MSCs (hUC-MSCs)...
strain: we collected heart, liver, white adipose tissue (WAT), iBAT, and skeletal muscle and attached tendon (labeled as “M + T”) from wild-type C57BL/6 mice...
